title: Group Anagrams
pattern: String â€” Hashmap with Canonical Key
coreIdea: Group words that are anagrams of each other by mapping each word to a canonical representation (its sorted character sequence), so anagrams naturally collide to the same hashmap key.
recognitionCues: list of strings given, asks to group by anagram relationship
order within a group doesn't matter
approach: For each word, sort its characters to form a key (or use a character-count tuple as key for better complexity). Use a hashmap from key to list of original words. Append each word to its key's list. Return the hashmap's values.
timeComplexity: O(n * k log k) where k is max word length, or O(n*k) with count-based key
